subject: negotiation start
fact: Bramgrim questions Murssvayas's legitimacy as Solom's representative.
source_quote: Bramgrim questions Murssvayas's legitimacy as Solom's representative

subject: proof of authority
fact: Murssvayas produces a pendant that Bramgrim recognizes as belonging to Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: Murssvayas produces a pendant that Bramgrim recognizes as belonging to Solom Ned'razak

subject: reward demand
fact: Bramgrim demands to know what reward the party will receive for the mission.
source_quote: Bramgrim, speaking for the party, demands to know what reward they will receive for such a dangerous mission

subject: initial reward dismissal
fact: Murssvayas initially dismisses the idea of payment.
source_quote: Murssvayas initially dismisses the idea of payment

subject: reward promise
fact: Murssvayas promises that Solom will grant the party an item from the horde of the Drow if they complete the mission and recover Szith Morcane.
source_quote: He promises that if the party completes the mission and Szith Morcane is recovered, Solom will grant them an item from the horde of the Drow

subject: mission agreement
fact: The party agrees to undertake the mission to rescue Xaven Tanor'this from the Den of the Whispered Word.
source_quote: The party agrees to undertake the mission to rescue Xaven Tanor'this from the Den of the Whispered Word

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana is the head of the Thieves Guild in Hillsfar.
source_quote: The head of the Thieves Guild sees new opportunities in the power vacuum

subject: Charles
fact: Charles is a messenger from the Emerald Enclave and member of La Résistance.
source_quote: Charles finds them here to deliver urgent news from the Emerald Enclave

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is a Drow representative with silver hair, thick sideburns, emerald green eyes, and skin so dark it's nearly purple.
source_quote: Murssvayas Dhuurniv... with silver hair, thick sideburns, emerald green eyes, and skin so dark it's nearly purple

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is the leader of the Drow outpost of Szith Morcane.
source_quote: The leader of the Drow outpost of Szith Morcane, an 18th level wizard

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is the Drow's chief alchemist who was captured during the raid on Szith Morcane.
source_quote: The Drow's chief alchemist who was working on a ritual to cull fiendish blood from the Graz'zt-infused fire giants

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a creature residing in the Den of the Whispered Word.
source_quote: A creature residing in the Den of the Whispered Word, an extraplanar brokerage in the Howling Pits

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt is a demon lord who is now infusing fire giants with his blood.
source_quote: He threatened vengeance and is now infusing fire giants with his blood

subject: Malkyn Grenefeld
fact: Malkyn Grenefeld is the recently defeated antagonist whose death triggered the current chaos in Hillsfar.
source_quote: The recently defeated antagonist whose death triggered the current chaos in Hillsfar

subject: Red Plume Guards
fact: The Red Plume Guards are caught between factions after the death of the ruling elite.
source_quote: The Red Plume guards are caught between factions

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: The Emerald Enclave sent urgent news to the party via Charles.
source_quote: Charles finds them here to deliver urgent news from the Emerald Enclave

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Hillsfar is a city recovering from weeks of chaos after the party defeated Malkyn Grenefeld.
source_quote: A city recovering from weeks of chaos after the party defeated Malkyn Grenefeld

subject: Hillsfar Castle
fact: Hillsfar Castle is the former seat of power in Hillsfar, now a bloody mess with shattered windows and destroyed artifacts.
source_quote: The former seat of power in Hillsfar, now a bloody mess with shattered windows and destroyed artifacts

subject: Silver Shadow Cave
fact: Silver Shadow Cave is a sacred site for communing with the moon goddess Selûne, located near Elventree.
source_quote: A sacred site for communing with the moon goddess Selûne, located near Elventree

subject: Szith Morcane
fact: Szith Morcane is a Drow outpost in the Underdark that was sacked by an army of slaves led by fiendish fire giants and demons.
source_quote: A Drow outpost in the Underdark that was sacked by an army of slaves led by fiendish fire giants and demons

subject: Sporedome
fact: Sporedome is a fungal forest in the Underdark where Solom Ned'razak and other Drow survivors took refuge.
source_quote: A fungal forest in the Underdark where Solom Ned'razak and other Drow survivors took refuge

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: Den of the Whispered Word is an extraplanar brokerage of goods and services located in the Howling Pits.
source_quote: An extraplanar brokerage of goods and services located in the Howling Pits

subject: Howling Pits
fact: Howling Pits is a twisted realm of the Underdark where Maram il Vass's refuge is located.
source_quote: A twisted realm of the Underdark where Maram il Vass's refuge, the Den of the Whispered Word, is located

subject: pendant
fact: The pendant belongs to Solom Ned'razak and was used by Murssvayas to prove his authority.
source_quote: Murssvayas produces a pendant that Bramgrim recognizes as belonging to Solom Ned'razak

subject: rescue mission
fact: The party has agreed to rescue Xaven Tanor'this from the Den of the Whispered Word.
source_quote: The party agrees to undertake the mission to rescue Xaven Tanor'this from the Den of the Whispered Word

subject: Drow horde reward
fact: The party is promised an item from the Drow horde upon successful completion of the mission.
source_quote: Solom will grant them an item from the horde of the Drow

subject: Graz'zt's plot
fact: Graz'zt is infusing fire giants with his blood to create a new threat.
source_quote: He threatened vengeance and is now infusing fire giants with his blood
